theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 1: Organic & Earthy (Modified for Mediterranean Portofino Elegance)
theme_and_archetype.mood: Sunny, Condé Nast Traveler editorial, luxurious 1960s Dolce Vita, luminous, fresh, airy

typography.heading_style: Elegant, editorial, high-contrast serif. Tight tracking on large text.
typography.subheading_style: Uppercase, tracking-[0.2em], text-sm, text-[#5B7B8C] or text-[#C8553D].
typography.hierarchy_rules: H1 max text-5xl md:text-7xl. Use fluid scaling.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous (p-12 to p-24) to emulate high-end editorial print margins.
layout_and_spacing.grids: Asymmetrical bento for galleries and menus. 1px visible grid borders (border-[#E5DFD3]) between sections to give structure.

component_rules.buttons: rounded-none, bg-[#C8553D] text-[#FFFFFF] hover:bg-[#A6442F]. Secondary buttons: border border-[#2C3E38] text-[#2C3E38] hover:bg-[#2C3E38] hover:text-[#F9F6F0]
component_rules.navbar: Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F9F6F0]/80, border-b border-[#E5DFD3], text-[#2C3E38]
component_rules.footer: bg-[#F9F6F0], XXL Logotype in Bodoni Moda (text-[#C8553D] or text-[#2C3E38]), clean structured columns with 1px top border.

motion_and_interactions.scrolling: Lenis smooth scroll mandatory for premium feel.
motion_and_interactions.animations: Framer motion for gentle text reveals (y-axis slide up), parallax on hero and large images.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Images scale slightly inside overflow-hidden containers. Text colors shift subtly.

media.overlay_rules: Max bg-black/20 on Hero. Do NOT darken images excessively. Keep the sunlit Portofino feel intact. Use gradient-to-t from-black/30 to-transparent only at the bottom if text readability is an issue.

hero_terrace.description: Portofino terrace at golden hour, blue/white striped umbrellas

about_lemons.description: Close-up of lemon trees on terracotta wall

wine_sea.description: White wine with blurred Portofino turquoise sea background

menu_burrata.description: Fresh burrata on a bright elegant plate

instructions_to_main_agent: REPLACE ALL DARK THEME UTILITIES with the new light Portofino palette specified in this JSON.
Do NOT use pure black backgrounds or overly heavy hero overlays. Max bg-black/20 to maintain the sun-drenched feel.
Ensure headings use Bodoni Moda. Import it if necessary via standard Google Fonts links.
Ensure 'rounded-none' is strictly applied to buttons, cards, and image wrappers. Keep it sharp and editorial.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='reservation-submit').
Retain the existing section routes (/sogno) and all key functionalities (Hero, La Storia, Il Menu, Galleria, Prenotazione/Contatto, Footer logotype XXL).
